ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for Wilford Kwong pong Leung (administrator).

Mr. Bresler stated that he filed a status report today, that he's still working on the inventory and appraisal, that he apologizes to the court and needs more time to file the documents. Status on close of estate is continued to November 14, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Puliego: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2023 Continued To Oct-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for Wilfred Leung (administrator).

Mr. Bresler stated that he confused two related matters and miss calendared the matter. The Court stated that there has been no filing for over 16 months and requested Mr. Bresler to file an Inventory and Appraisal. Status on close of estate is continued to October 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel to file status a week before the October 10, 2023 hearing date.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Continued To Sep-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appearing via zoom for Wilfred Kwong Pung Leung (administrator).

Mr. Bresler requests to have the matter continued to August 08, 2023. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to August 08, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appearing via zoom Wilford Leung (administrator).

Discussion was held in regard to inventory and appraisal not being filed. Mr. Brelser stated he was not sure of the property being transferable. Order to show cause is ordered off calendar. Status on close of estate is continued to July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status report to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing and is due on July 05, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Peter Bresler appearing via zoom for Pui Sun Leung Leung (administrator).

The Court noted that an Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. Mr. Bresler indicated that he is not ready to close the estate. The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause to the administrator Pui Sun Leung Leung to appear on June 06, 2023 at 9:00am in dept. 204 to show why he/she should not be sanctioned $250.00 for not filing the required document on time. Status on close of estate is continued to June 06, 2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: M. Svahlin. Not reported.
